L

lastModified() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFile
Returns the time that the file was last modified.

Requests to launch an application specified with launcher action

Requests to launch an application specified with uuid

Provides the launching actions.
LauncherService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.launcher
Provides interfaces to launch an app with actions.
ldapBindUser - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.AuthenticatedUserInfo

length() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFile
Returns the length of the file.
LIBRARY_NOT_INSTALLED - Static variable in exception com.hp.workpath.api.SsdkUnsupportedException
Indicates that Workpath SDK is not installed.
LIBRARY_UPDATE_IS_REQUIRED - Static variable in exception com.hp.workpath.api.SsdkUnsupportedException
Indicates that Workpath SDK needs to be updated to compatible version which is using by an application.
listFiles() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFile
Returns an array of CustomerDataFile.

localizedName - Variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.SignInMethod
